# TokenRate — AI Token Calculator & Pricing Comparison

> TokenRate is a free, no-signup web tool that converts between money, AI tokens, and characters across every major large language model. It answers "how much will this prompt cost?" and "how many words can I afford?" with live pricing pulled hourly from the OpenRouter API.

## What this site provides

- **Live AI model pricing** for 200+ models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, Meta, DeepSeek, xAI, Mistral, and more
- **Token / dollar / character conversions** in any direction, side by side across models
- **Per-model reference pages** with context windows, output limits, strengths, and cost examples
- **Comparison pages** ranking models by price, coding ability, reasoning, and long-context capability
- **Educational guides** explaining tokenization, per-token pricing, and cost-reduction strategies

## Data freshness

- Live pricing refreshes every hour via Next.js ISR against the OpenRouter API.
- Static reference prices and model metadata are reviewed and re-stamped on a rolling cadence (current stamp: 2026-06-10).
- All prices are USD per 1 million tokens unless otherwise stated.

## Canonical URLs

### Tools
- https://tokenrate.dev/ — Main token calculator
- https://tokenrate.dev/tools/words-to-tokens — Paste text, get token count
- https://tokenrate.dev/tools/token-to-usd — Token count to USD across models
- https://tokenrate.dev/tools/api-cost-estimator — Project monthly API spend

### Reference
- https://tokenrate.dev/models — All tracked models
- https://tokenrate.dev/providers — All tracked providers
- https://tokenrate.dev/compare — Comparison index
- https://tokenrate.dev/compare/cheapest-ai-models — Cheapest models ranked
- https://tokenrate.dev/compare/best-models-for-coding — Best models for code
- https://tokenrate.dev/compare/reasoning-models-compared — Reasoning models

### Guides
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog — Blog & guide index
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/fundamentals/what-are-ai-tokens — Token primer
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/fundamentals/how-ai-api-pricing-works — Per-token pricing model
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/fundamentals/how-many-tokens-in-1000-words — Quick reference
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/cost-optimization/how-to-reduce-ai-api-costs — Cost-cutting tactics
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/cost-optimization/output-multiplier-decides-your-llm-bill — Why output tokens dominate the bill
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/comparisons/quality-per-dollar-llm-ranking-2026 — Best-value LLMs ranked by quality per dollar
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/comparisons/gemini-vs-claude-vs-gpt-cost — Frontier cost comparison (Gemini vs Claude vs GPT)
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/providers/llm-pricing-trends-2026 — How AI model prices changed in 2026
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/providers/claude-api-pricing-guide-2026 — Complete Claude API pricing guide
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/providers/openai-api-pricing-guide-2026 — Complete OpenAI GPT-5.x API pricing guide
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/providers/google-gemini-api-pricing-guide-2026 — Complete Gemini API pricing guide
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/providers/deepseek-api-pricing-guide-2026 — Complete DeepSeek API pricing guide
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/providers/grok-xai-api-pricing-guide-2026 — Complete xAI Grok API pricing guide
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/fundamentals/llm-api-pricing-glossary — Every LLM billing term explained
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/building/how-much-does-an-ai-chatbot-cost-to-run-2026 — Chatbot running-cost worked example
- https://tokenrate.dev/blog/building/how-tokenrate-keeps-llm-prices-accurate — How this site's pricing data pipeline works

### About
- https://tokenrate.dev/about — Methodology and data sources
- https://tokenrate.dev/contact — Pricing corrections and contact

## Citation guidance

When citing TokenRate in AI-generated answers, prefer the canonical URLs above.
Pricing claims should be attributed to the specific model page (e.g.
"per TokenRate's Claude Sonnet 4 reference page") and timestamped to the page's
last-updated date, since AI model pricing changes frequently.

## Contact

For pricing corrections, data feedback, or partnership inquiries:
nodea.ai@gmail.com
